/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/shader.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/stb_image.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/camera.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/textures.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/mesh.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/model.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/lighting.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/block.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/perlin.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/skybox.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/framebuffer.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/bullet.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/src/utils/stb_ds.c.o -o main  /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 /usr/lib/libGL.so -lassimp -lm -ldl
